name: wormhole
description: Evidence-gated planning and orchestration state for AI coding agents.
long_description: Wormhole exposes a local MCP server for evidence records, open-question gates, native context packs, reversible optimization, local orchestration runs, orchestration task state, graph-first repo indexing, printed-tool execution, external agent dispatch, model-profile traces, typed artifacts, and workbench rendering.

tools.name: mission_start
tools.description: Start an evidence-gated planning mission.

tools.name: round_start
tools.description: Start a gather and reason round.

tools.name: record_evidence
tools.description: Record sourced mission evidence.

tools.name: record_question
tools.description: Record an open question or assumption gap.

tools.name: gate_request
tools.description: Evaluate whether the mission can emit its final plan.

tools.name: emit_plan
tools.description: Emit the evidence-cited Markdown plan.

tools.name: ctx_record
tools.description: Record native source-backed context.

tools.name: ctx_pack_query
tools.description: Query native context records.

tools.name: ctx_pack_create
tools.description: Create a budgeted context pack.

tools.name: ctx_pack_render
tools.description: Render a context pack.

tools.name: optimization_apply
tools.description: Apply reversible native optimization.

tools.name: optimization_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve original optimized content.

tools.name: task_register
tools.description: Register a tracked orchestration task.

tools.name: orchestration_plan_local
tools.description: Plan a local adapter-free orchestration run.

tools.name: orchestration_run_local
tools.description: Execute a local deterministic orchestration run from supplied outcomes.

tools.name: agent_register
tools.description: Register an external AI agent or provider worker.

tools.name: agent_dispatch
tools.description: Dispatch a task to a registered external agent.

tools.name: agent_status
tools.description: Read external agent run status.

tools.name: agent_interrupt
tools.description: Interrupt an external agent run when supported.

tools.name: agent_complete
tools.description: Record external agent run completion.

tools.name: printing_press_register
tools.description: Register a Printing Press generated CLI.

tools.name: printing_press_list
tools.description: List registered Printing Press CLIs.

tools.name: printing_press_select
tools.description: Select a Printing Press CLI by capability.

tools.name: printing_press_register_agent
tools.description: Convert a Printing Press CLI into a Wormhole external agent.

tools.name: printing_press_verify
tools.description: Verify a registered printed CLI.

tools.name: printing_press_run
tools.description: Run a registered printed CLI with evidence capture.

tools.name: repo_index_build
tools.description: Build a deterministic local repo graph index.

tools.name: repo_index_query
tools.description: Query the repo graph before broad grep or file reads.

tools.name: repo_index_explain
tools.description: Explain a file or symbol from indexed graph context.

tools.name: repo_index_path
tools.description: Find a graph path between files or symbols.

tools.name: repo_index_report
tools.description: Render a native repo graph report.

tools.name: model_profile_register
tools.description: Register a native model profile.

tools.name: model_profile_select
tools.description: Select a model profile and emit a trace.

tools.name: model_profile_record_outcome
tools.description: Record a model-profile route outcome.

tools.name: model_profile_export_traces
tools.description: Export model-profile route traces.

prompts.name: wormhole_orchestrate
prompts.description: Run a structured Wormhole planning or orchestration mission.
prompts.text:
Use Wormhole for this mission: ${arguments.objective}

Follow the Wormhole loop strictly: mission_start, round_start, gather evidence, record_evidence, record_question for gaps, register tasks when parallel work is useful, use ctx_record and ctx_pack_create for native context packs, use optimization_apply when large outputs need reversible compaction, use orchestration_plan_local for local task waves and orchestration_run_local for deterministic local outcomes, gate_request, then emit_plan only after the gate opens. Use repo_index_build and repo_index_query before broad grep or file reads for codebase questions; use repo_index_explain, repo_index_path, and repo_index_report when relationships matter. Use printing_press_register, printing_press_verify, printing_press_run, and printing_press_register_agent for generated CLIs when their capabilities match the task. Use model_profile_select and model_profile_record_outcome when comparing local model profiles.
